channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Cross-Border Bus Fares Soar as Zimbabweans Flee Xenophobia in South Africa
item.description: Cross-Border Bus Fares Soar as Zimbabweans Flee Xenophobia in South Africa Thousands of Zimbabweans leaving South Africa amid growing anti-migrant tensions are facing another challenge, with some cross-border transport operators accused of sharply increasing fares and luggage cha via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: DEADLY NEW TYPE OF CANCER: Karoi man loses his PEN!S after sleeping with married women, gets dumped by his wife and 4 children
item.description: A Life Undone: The Agony of Remigio Tom and Zimbabwe’s Battle with Belief and Disease Karoi – The story of Remigio Tom, a 47-year-old man from Karoi, is a harrowing tale that intertwines personal tragedy with deeply entrenched cultural beliefs and the stark realities of a devasta via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabweans face 5-year South Africa re-entry ban @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwean nationals who voluntarily agreed to return home from South Africa have expressed shock and disappointment after learning they will be declared undesirable and barred from re-entering the co... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Zimbabweans repatriated from South Africa face possible re-entry ban
item.description: Cape Times Foreign nationals who voluntarily agreed to be repatriated from Cape Town to the Beitbridge border have expressed dismay after learning they would be declared undesirable and barred from re-entering South Africa for up to five years. Since Sunday, the Department of Hom via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: AMH, ZimInd editor Zaba removed from remand as state withdraws charges
item.description: Zimbabwe Independent editor Faith Zaba and her employer, Alpha Media Holdings (AMH), were removed from remand after the National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) withdrew criminal charges against them before plea, bringing the prosecution to an end. Harare magistrate Aplonia Marutya o via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe complete biggest ever Test win after thrashing Bangladesh in Harare
item.description: SABC Sport Innocent Kaia struck a maiden century before the bowlers starred as Zimbabwe recorded their biggest-ever Test victory after thrashing Bangladesh by an innings and 85 runs in Harare. Zimbabwe took the early ascendancy in the contest when Bangladesh were bowled out for j via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Building societies’ lowest-paid workers to earn US$660 after new wage deal
item.description: THE Commercial Workers Union of Zimbabwe (CWUZ) has secured a significant wage increase for employees in the building societies sector following the successful conclusion of a new Collective Bargaining Agreement (CBA). The agreement was reached between CWUZ, representing non-mana via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News
